message:
fix: Correct .gitignore formatting for warnings.jsonl entry

The previous commit accidentally appended the ops/warnings.jsonl pattern
without a newline, causing it to merge with the test_report_* pattern.

Before (incorrect):
```
test_report_*ops/warnings.jsonl
```

After (correct):
```
test_report_*
ops/warnings.jsonl
```

This ensures both patterns work independently to ignore their respective files.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -218,4 +218,5 @@ out/
 # Cryptographic signing keys (Ed25519 key pairs for bundle signing)
 signing-*.key
 signing-*.pub
-test_report_*ops/warnings.jsonl
+test_report_*
+ops/warnings.jsonl
